design_plan: rng=42; AIDA checked; hero width math fits 2–3 lines @1120px; bento+compare grids include grid-auto-flow:dense; labels mention Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; button contrast validated
headline: Super vs Siri — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: Siri AI is a dramatically improved, privacy‑first assistant deeply embedded in Apple devices. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache, making repeated workflows faster and cheaper over time.
